name: Green Beans German Style
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces green beans, canned,  see note
recipeInstructions:
NOTE: Drain the green beans, reserving 1/3 cup liquid.
In a medium skillet, fry the bacon until crisp. Remove the bacon and drain on paper towels.
Saute the onion in the bacon drippings until it is crisp-tender. Add the sugar, flour, vinegar, and reserved liquid; cook until smooth and thickened, stirring constantly.
Add the beans and heat thoroughly. Garnish with bacon.
Source: Pillsbury - Great Fast Meals.
